references.text: Danser BH. 1955. Supplementary notes on the Santalaceous genera Dendromyza and Cladomyza. Nova Guinea nov. ser. 6: 261-277.
Danser, BH. 1940. On some genera of Santalaceae Osyrideae from the Malay Archipelago, mainly from New Guinea. Nova Guinea nov. ser. 4: 133-150.
Macklin J & J Parnell. 2002. An account of the Santalaceae of Thailand. Thai For. Bull. 30: 75-115.
Macklin J. 2000. A systematic revision of the Santalaceae R.Br. of Southeast Asia. Ph.D. Dissertation. Trinity College, Dublin, Ireland
Nickrent, DLV, R Malécot, R Vidal-Russell & JP Der. 2010. A revised classification of Santalales. Taxon 59: 538-558.
Pilger, R. 1935. Santalaceae in Engler, Natürlichen Pflanzenfamilien ed. 2, 16b: 52-91.
Stauffer HU. 1969. Santalales-Studien X. Amphorogyneae eine Neue Tribus der Santalaceae. Vierteljahrsschr. Naturf. Ges. Zürich 114: 49-76.
Xia, NH. 1992. Notes on Santalaceae from China. Acta Phytotax. Sin. 30: 471-472.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 13 March 2022

species.citation: (Danser) Byng & Christenh. , Global Fl. 4 (2018) 144; ≡ Cladomyza multinervis Danser , Nova Guinea, N.S. 6 (1955) 274; Type: from Solomon Isls. = Dendromyza volubilis Stauffer , Vierteljahrsschr. Naturf. Ges. Zürich 114 (1969) 61; Type: from Moluccas.
species.distribution: Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Solomon Isls. MINDANAO: Davao, Davao Oriental (photos), Davao del Sur (photos).

species.citation: (Danser) J.M.Macklin ex Beaman & C.E.Anderson , Pl. Mt. Kinabalu 5 (2004) 368; ≡ Cladomyza pachydisca Danser , Nova Guinea, N.S. 4 (1940) 140; Type: from Borneo.
species.distribution: Borneo, New Guinea, Philippines. MINDANAO: Bukidnon.

species.citation: (Blume) Danser , Nova Guinea, N.S. 4 (1940) 133; ≡ Tupeia reinwardtiana Blume , Fl. Javae Loranth. (1830) t.28; Type: from Sumatra. = Dendromyza reinwardtiana var. aphylla Stauffer , Vierteljahrsschr. Naturf. Ges. Zürich 114 (1969) 60; Type: Elmer 14063 (MAN, holo; A, L, Z), Mindanao, Mt Urdaneta.
species.distribution: Borneo, Java, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra. LUZON: Bataan, Benguet, Cagayan (photos), MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Davao del Sur, Surigao, NEGROS.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 1 July 2021

species.citation: (Blume) Miq. , Fl. Ned. Ind. 1(1) (1856) 781; ≡ Henslowia buxifolia Blume , Mus. Bot. 1 (1851) 244.
species.distribution: Borneo, Cambodia, China, Java, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. PALAWAN.

species.citation: (Blume) Miq. , Fl. Ned. Ind. 1(1) (1856) 780 ; Soejarto et al., Prelim. Checklist Fl. Pl. Palawan (1995); ≡ Henslowia varians Blume , Mus. Bot. 1 (1851) 244. = Henslowia palawanensis Elmer , LPB 5 (1913) 1834. = Henslowia lobbiana (Miq.) A.DC. , Prodr. (A. P. de Candolle) 14 (1857) 631 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 114; ≡ Dendrotrophe lobbiana Miq. , Fl. Ned. Ind. 1(1) (1858) 1096.
species.distribution: Australia, Borneo, Cambodia, China, Laos, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, New Guinea, ?Nicobar Isls, Philippines, Singapore, Thailand, Vietnam. PALAWAN.
